untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection ('Run of Higher Highs') requires multi-candle historical sequence analysis (comparing highs across N previous bars to identify ascending pattern). This requires candle-by-candle lookback logic not expressible with single-bar indicators. The signal also lacks specific exit criteria (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), quantified thresholds for pattern confirmation, and success rates needed for robust rule translation.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture breakout logic: LONG entry on upward breakout (close > prev_high), SHORT entry on downward breakout (close < prev_low). Exit conditions inferred as reversal of entry signals. However, the core 'higher highs' pattern detection cannot be implemented without multi-bar comparison logic. The 8% average decline noted in parameters was used as stop_loss_pct for SHORT positions. Regime targeting set to TRENDING_UP (bull) and TRENDING_DOWN (bear) per target_regimes. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal.
